creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #14)

The patch is a personal hack and depends on that I use
shell windows that have lots of columns, I just added
text to existing lines (and made it display more
significant digits in various places as well).

It also has material from a patch someone submitted
that was never adopted: it has a "pbt" order available
for "process birth time".

Most likely I'll just Email you a copy/paste of
the git diff from my /usr/13S-src/ , not that the
FreeBSD vintage will be a detailed match. (This
might not preserve all whitespace correctly.)

I use it with the linkes of, say,

# top -HICazores

This makes it track thread counts, not process counts
and puts more RAM usage towards the top of the thread
list (same figure for each thread of a process).
